description: Join us for the final day of Binance Blockchain Week, where we explore blockchain applications beyond finance and crypto, highlighting their potential to improve the world. Featuring insights from industry leaders and discussions on education initiatives and developer programs.
topic_summary: The Future is Good - A discussion on the positive impact of blockchain technology on society, featuring speakers like Helen Hai and Akon, and initiatives aimed at educating and empowering developers in Africa. [t=0:16] to [t=13:36]
